College of Agricultural Engineering and Post Harvest Technology (Sikkim), College of I lome Science and College of Post Graduate Studies (Meghalaya). Whereas, the Government of Meghalaya has allotted and transferred the land measuring 50 acres at Tura to the Central Agricultural University for the establishment of the Qollege of Home Science vide their notification No. Agri. (G)/412/93-150, dated, the 18th March 1997. Whereas, the Government of India in the Department of Agricultural Research and Education has approved the issue/making of an Ordinance for the establishment of College of Home Science, West Garo Hills, Tura. Meghalaya as a constituent college of the Central Agricultural University, Imphal vide letter No. 42-1/94-Edn(1V) dated 30.09.1997.
